title: pistacia lentiscus subsp. emarginata
intro: Pistacia lentiscus subsp. emarginata, also known as the mastic heath or lentisk, is a shrub native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the genus Pistacia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pistacia lentiscus subsp. emarginata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular natural remedy. The herbal preparations of this plant often include its resin, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, such as creams and ointments.
